morning.title: LastPass notifies customers that their personal information and customer support case records were stolen during a hack at Canadian market research company Klue
morning.summary: LastPass notifies customers of a data breach at Klue, a Canadian market research company, resulting in stolen personal information and customer support case records.

morning.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
morning.summary: HaloBraid raises $7M in funding from Seven Seven Six to streamline hair salon appointments, reducing wait times and increasing efficiency.

morning.title: Alibaba's AI video model rises to No. 2 in global rankings, as OpenAI's Sora and ByteDance's Seedance fall away
morning.summary: Alibaba's AI video model achieves the second rank globally, surpassing OpenAI's Sora and ByteDance's Seedance in the rankings.

morning.title: No Claude Fable 5? No problem: Sakana achieves frontier performance with new Fugu multi-model, auto synthesis system
morning.summary: Sakana introduces the Fugu multi-model, an auto synthesis system that achieves frontier performance without relying on Claude Fable 5.

morning.title: The Download: the future of chipmaking and Anthropic’s government clash
morning.summary: A discussion on the future of chipmaking, including ASML's role, and Anthropic's recent government clash over AI technology.

morning.title: Everyone pays the price as patent holders on seeds stifle innovation
morning.summary: Patent holders on seeds are stifling innovation in the agricultural sector, ultimately affecting food production and availability.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquires Red Hat to become a leading provider of hybrid cloud solutions, strengthening its position in the cloud market.

morning.title: With Starfall, SpaceX eyes an edge in global cargo delivery from orbit
morning.summary: SpaceX introduces Starfall, aiming to dominate global cargo delivery from orbit and expand its capabilities in space transportation.

morning.title: The $400 million machine powering the future of chipmaking
morning.summary: A $400 million machine from ASML is poised to revolutionize the future of chipmaking, enabling the production of smaller, more efficient chips.

morning.title: AI hit the memory wall — now it needs a new context tier
morning.summary: The increasing demands of AI systems are pushing against the limits of traditional memory, necessitating the development of a new context tier to support future growth.

gym.summary: A comprehensive tutorial on running effective ChatGPT ads, covering setup, targeting, and optimization strategies.

gym.summary: A reflective look at the lessons learned from ten years of marriage, offering insights and advice on building a strong, lasting relationship.

gym.summary: An introduction to the emerging ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) solutions designed specifically for the AI-driven revolution, streamlining business processes and enhancing decision-making.

gym.summary: A discussion on the unique challenges and opportunities of managing a $120 billion balance sheet without external investors, highlighting strategies for success and growth.
